summary: Comprehensive testing of AI-Powered Personalized Onboarding Assistant completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI functional with excellent role-based navigation and dashboard features. Minor UX improvements needed for milestone interaction and chat widget discoverability.

ui_bugs.issue: Milestone checkboxes not easily discoverable or may be styled as different elements
AI Chat widget not easily discoverable on dashboard or plan pages
Logout button not clearly visible in user interface

passed_tests: Login page loads with all required elements
Demo account buttons auto-fill credentials correctly
Employee dashboard shows welcome message and progress stats
Plan view displays progress rings and phase sections
HR admin login (admin@example.com) redirects to HR dashboard
HR dashboard shows stat cards and employee cohort table
Employee detail page navigation and display works
HR employee detail page shows milestones and override panel
Authentication for all demo users working
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvements needed: 1) Make milestone checkboxes more discoverable in plan view, 2) Add visible AI chat widget to dashboard/plan pages, 3) Add clear logout button to user interface. All core functionality is working correctly.
